parents.subject: LU-13246 osd: unlock os_lock if it was locked

commit.subject: LU-13568 tests: Default lustre_revision: in test log yaml
commit.message:
LU-13568 tests: Default lustre_revision: in test log yaml

When running tests on local clusters the default value
logged to yaml files for lustre_revision is empty.

This provides a default value from the running lustre filesystem
via the lustre sysfs version

Test-Parameters: trivial
HPE-bug-id: LUS-8701
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I57bce63a10a24436af7ee47f115c8638a0ca35ab
